stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
An aircraft has the option to cruise at either 4000 ft or 10 000 ft. Based on the following information and the attached table, which altitude should the pilots choose to fly at?

ISA: +0°
4000 ft: Calm winds
10 000 ft: 10 kt headwind
Distance: 166 NM

options.a: 4000 ft, due to lower fuel consumption.
options.b: 4000 ft, due to calm wind conditions.
options.c: 10 000 ft, due to lower fuel consumption.
options.d: The fuel consumption is the same in both scenarios.
